mapper.sql:
SELECT CG.code_group, CG.code_group_nm, CG.code_group_desc, CG.use_yn, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CODE_DETAIL_INFO WHERE code_group = CG.code_group AND use_yn = 'Y') AS code_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CG.code_group) AS rsn FROM TB_CODE_GROUP_INFO CG WHERE CG.use_yn = 'Y'
AND (CG.code_group_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CG.code_group LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CODE_GROUP_INFO WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
AND (code_group_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code_group LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CODE_GROUP_INFO SET use_yn = 'N' WHERE code_group = #{codeGroup}
mapper.select: SELECT code_group, code_value, code_nm, code_desc, use_yn, sort_order FROM TB_CODE_DETAIL_INFO WHERE code_group = #{codeGroup} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, code_value
SELECT * FROM TB_CODE_DETAIL_INFO WHERE code_group = #{codeGroup} AND code_value = #{codeValue}
